AI.title: AI tried to bury this politician — now people have actually heard of him

AI.title: Robinhood will let your AI agent trade stocks and make (or lose) lots of money
AI.summary: Robinhood is opening its trading platform to AI agents. In an announcement on Wednesday, Robinhood says traders can now create a separate account for an AI agent and add a specific amount of money, allowing the agent to buy and sell stocks across the market. The company pitches the feature as a way …

AI.summary: In the wake of Google expanding its AI verification efforts at I/O, YouTube is now finally going to start taking AI labeling seriously. YouTube has announced that it's relocating AI disclosures on Shorts and long-form videos to make them easier to spot and will start automatically identifying and la…

AI.title: The AI fight brewing inside The New York Times
AI.summary: How newsrooms should use AI - or if they should at all - has been a recurrent debate within the media industry over the last several years. AI.title: The Pope isn’t AGI-pilled
AI.summary: On Monday, Pope Leo XIV unveiled an encyclical letter addressing the societal implications of artificial intelligence. AI.title: Illinois Lawmakers Just Passed America’s Strongest AI Safety Bill
AI.summary: The bill requires companies like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google to have third parties confirm they’re following safety standards. Illinois governor JB Pritzker says he’ll sign it.

AI.title: Huawei's ‘Chip Queen’ Throws Down the Gauntlet
AI.summary: The Chinese company is adapting to the demise of Moore’s Law, which guides chip production. It could complicate US chip dominance.

AI.title: Former Google and Apple Researchers Launch a Startup to Build AI’s Missing Feedback Loop
AI.summary: Trajectory is betting the rapid iteration cycle that supercharged vibe-coding can help all kinds of companies build AI products that learn continuously.

游戏.title: Steam Deck Price Increase Announced by Valve
游戏.summary: Valve has announced a substantial price increase for the Steam Deck. The company announced today that all new OLED models are officially back in stock after months of being out of stock, but they will be getting a price increase.

游戏.title: Brandon Sanderson Explains Why He Chose the One Piece Studio to Adapt His Epic Sci-Fi Series
Adventure Time: Side Quests to Premiere First 2 Episodes at IGN Live 2026
游戏.summary: Fans attending IGN Live 2026 will have the opportunity to be the first to watch the first two episodes of the new animated series Adventure Time: Side Quests on Saturday, June 7th at 12:45pm PT.

游戏.title: Marvel Legend Stan Lee to Be 'Resurrected' Through AI, With His Voice and Likeness Licensed for Commercial Use
游戏.summary: The late Marvel comics legend Stan Lee will have his voice and likeness replicated by an AI company for commercial use, it's been announced.

游戏.title: X-Men '97 Season 2 Disney+ Release Date Confirmed, Debut Trailer Released
游戏.summary: X-Men ’97 Season 2 finally has a release date — July 1 on Disney+ — and a debut trailer confirming the appearance of a long list of new characters, and a big reversal in fortunes for Wolverine.

游戏.title: Destiny 2 Fans Plan Mass Protest to 'Crash the Servers' and Beat Marathon's All-Time Player Record
游戏.summary: Destiny 2 fans distraught over Bungie's decision to end support for the franchise are planning to try and "crash the servers" to demonstrate that there's still huge interest in the game.

游戏.title: Blizzard Boss Wouldn't Rule Out Overwatch Animated Series, Knows Fans Have Wanted It for Years
游戏.summary: Blizzard intends to expand the Overwatch universe beyond the recent Fortnite collab, with an animated series not ruled out.

游戏.title: 10 Billion Pokémon Cards Were Printed Last Year — and It Still Wasn't Enough to Stop Shortages and Scalping
游戏.summary: The Pokémon Company manufactured more than 10 billion Pokémon trading cards last year alone, and has now produced a staggering total of 85 billion cards to date.

游戏.summary: Hulk's return in Spider-Man: Brand New Day might be an open secret, but a new toy leak has spilled fresh detail on how Bruce Banner will suddenly lose control.

游戏.summary: YouTube has announced improved AI labels for videos as part of a movie to add transparency to content made with generative AI.

游戏.summary: No Man’s Sky developer Hello Games has announced The Swarm update, which adds a “mysterious Death Star like construct” to the sci-fi adventure.

游戏.summary: IGN can exclusively reveal the new trailer for Zorro, a French-language TV series reimagining of the iconic swashbuckling hero starring Oscar winner Jean Dujardin (The Artist).

科技.title: Google engineer charged with insider trading after making $1.2M on Polymarket
科技.summary: According to the complaint, a Google engineer risked over $2.7 million on wagers related to Google's 2025 Year in Search campaign.

科技.title: Why Google’s AI can’t spell Google (or anything else)
Rivian will deliver the first R2 SUVs on June 9
科技.summary: The company has finally set a date for the first customer deliveries of what CEO RJ Scaringe has said is "maybe the most important thing we’ve launched to date."

科技.summary: The Series B round was led by Battery Ventures.

科技.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
科技.summary: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

科技.title: Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
科技.summary: Payroll service provider Remote recently surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and became cash-flow positive, thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI adoption.

科技.title: UK Visa Portal exposed thousands of applicants’ passports and selfies — then called the lawyers on us
科技.summary: The third-party website exposed passports, selfies, and the location data of applicants who submitted their documents as part of the U.K. visa application process. Instead of fixing the issue, the website sent attorneys.

科技.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
科技.summary: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand.

科技.title: With a new $100M raise, Princeton’s Thea Energy is now a top-funded fusion startup
科技.summary: Thea Energy's pixel-inspired magnets could give its power plant plans a boost. The fusion startup hopes to get a commercial reactor working by 2034.

科技.title: CrowdStrike and Google take down botnet used by hackers to target open source software developers
科技.summary: Cybercriminals used the Glassworm botnet to infect open source software projects with malware, and in turn hack the developers and companies that use that software.

科技.title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
科技.summary: As Cognition reaches $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.

科技.title: FAA orders SpaceX to investigate Starship V3 booster failure
科技.summary: Starship is grounded until SpaceX finds out why the first V3 booster failed during its first test flight.

科技.title: ElevenLabs’ new music-generation model can switch genres mid-track
科技.summary: ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting the rest of the track.

科技.title: Spotify now lets you ‘clip’ moments from your favorite podcast
科技.summary: With the new scissors icon, you can clip favorite moments from podcasts and share them with your audience.
